reward_contract.note: reward_total is only comparable within runs that share the same reward_mode/reward_family. Use terminal service metrics and order_level_ret_mean for cross-mode interpretation.

benchmark_metadata.command: python scripts/benchmark_control_reward.py --seeds 11 --train-timesteps 64 --eval-episodes 2 --eval-risk-levels current increased severe --step-size-hours 168.0 --max-steps 260 --algo ppo --frame-stack 1 --observation-version v1 --risk-level increased --year-basis thesis --reward-mode ReT_seq_v1 --ret-seq-kappa 0.2 --w-bo 4.0 --w-cost 0.02 --w-disr 0.0 --output-dir outputs/paper_benchmarks/smoke_cobb_bridge_k020 --stochastic-pt
